title: Backend uses plain HTTP
description: Detect origin definitions that appear to use insecure HTTP transport.
message: Backend appears to use plain HTTP transport.
remediation: Confirm origin TLS expectations and avoid HTTP for production traffic when possible.

title: Direct IP origin detected
description: Detect direct IP-based origins instead of DNS-managed hostnames.
message: Origin target appears to be a direct IP rather than a DNS-managed hostname.
remediation: Review whether direct-IP origining is intentional and maintainable.

title: Production-like backend with no obvious shield signal
description: Detect prod-like services with backend definitions but no obvious shield-related configuration in local context.
message: Production-like backend detected without obvious shield configuration.
remediation: Review whether shield usage is expected for this origin topology.

title: Client-controlled header influences trust/access logic
description: Detect request headers being used near trust, access, or security decisions.
message: Client-controlled header appears to influence trust or access logic.
remediation: Do not trust client-supplied headers for origin trust or access control.

title: Bypass-style conditional detected
description: Detect pass/allow/skip-style conditions that may create externally triggerable bypasses.
remediation: Review whether this path, header, or user-agent-based bypass is intentionally scoped.

title: Spoofable rate-limit identity source
description: Detect rate-limit or identity logic that appears to rely on client-controlled headers.
message: Rate-limit or identity logic appears to rely on client-controlled input.
remediation: Prefer trusted edge-derived identities rather than spoofable request headers for rate-limit keys.

title: No obvious logging configuration detected
description: Detect services or modules with service/backend patterns but no obvious logging configuration nearby.
remediation: Confirm this service emits standard request and edge diagnostics through a local or shared logging module.

title: Custom edge logic with weak visibility story
description: Detect nontrivial custom edge logic with little evidence of logging or debugging support.
message: Custom edge logic detected without a clear observability pattern.
remediation: Review whether request decisions can be reconstructed during incident response.
